context.goal: Insert an image file into the current PDF/page using the Insert Image workflow.
context.cues: TIAEditor window is open on page 1 of 37, showing a PDF slide canvas. The toolbar is in Insert/Image mode, with a bottom status message indicating that an image can be inserted by selecting a rectangle.

state_anchor.locator: bottom status text: 'InsertImage mode: Select a rectangle to insert an image'

anchors.locator: top-right toolbar button labeled 'Insert' with picture-plus icon

procedure.expect: The image insertion Form dialog opens over the document, showing file path, size, scale, position, rotation controls, and a Choose button.
A Windows Open File dialog appears with image files and folders visible.
The screenshot image file becomes selected and its name appears in the File name field.
The Open File dialog closes and the Form dialog returns with the selected image path filled in.
The form closes, the chosen image is inserted onto the page, and the editor switches to select image mode with the inserted inline image visible on the slide.
